description.short: Clean neckline, tailored waist and fluid satin volume for an understated look.
description.full:
Concept

  • Style: Minimal modern ballgown
  • Fabric Direction: Matte satin with soft internal structure
  • Focus: Sharp silhouette and elegant movement

Status

  • Design phase
  • Pattern and prototype pending

description.short: A dramatic volume concept with ornate embroidery placement and cathedral presence.
description.full:
Concept

  • Style: Regal embroidered ballgown
  • Fabric Direction: Layered tulle with metallic thread accents
  • Focus: Royal silhouette with high-impact texture

Status

  • Design board approved
  • Material sourcing in progress

description.short: Romantic draping and airy layers designed for a soft, poetic bridal profile.
description.full:
Concept

  • Style: Romantic layered A-line
  • Fabric Direction: Light tulle and lace blend
  • Focus: Gentle volume and soft movement

Status

  • Sketch and drape study complete
  • Prototype not yet produced
